In the Table to the said notification, - (1) against serial No.12, in column (3}, for items (2) and (3) and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted namely:- . “(2) Mr. Ganesh Narayan Raul (3) Smt. Neena Kulkarni”; (ii) against serial No.66, in column (3), for item (1) and the entry relating thereto, the following shall be substituted namely:- “(1) Sl-u'i_.
